entity: BBR source abbreviation VAN (Vancouver Grizzlies 1995-2001) maps to warehouse canonical MEM (Memphis Grizzlies 2001+); same franchise, relocated 2001 (team_id 1610612763)

query_target.sql: SELECT (SELECT cast(count(*) AS INTEGER) FROM dim_team WHERE team_id = '1610612763' AND city = 'Vancouver' AND abbreviation = 'VAN') AS van_row_count, (SELECT cast(count(*) AS INTEGER) FROM dim_team WHERE team_id = '1610612763' AND city = 'Memphis' AND abbreviation = 'MEM') AS mem_row_count

notes: Both VAN and MEM share team_id 1610612763 in dim_team, confirming the same franchise continued across the 2001 relocation. CAST(... AS INTEGER) keeps the count as a JSON number (not BIGINT-as-string) so objectMatching compares cleanly. NOTE: the task spec asked for `query_fn: getTeamIdentity` but no such function exists in web/server/queries.ts — using raw_sql against dim_team per the existing team_identity fixture pattern.
